# PERF-212 negative: db.Find with a chained .Limit
lang: go
file: PERF-212-safe.go
variant: framework
---
package sample

import "gorm.io/gorm"

type Order struct {
	ID    uint
	Total float64
}

func LoadPage(db *gorm.DB, page, size int) ([]Order, error) {
	var orders []Order
	if err := db.Limit(size).Offset(page * size).Find(&orders).Error; err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	return orders, nil
}
